comments.body:
Applied live: pushed refs/meta/config 4d5a28a..98e7cb3; created Contributors group (uuid f53ff2cc..., owner Administrators) with member RebarBotNava + subgroup Administrators. Verified: Submit ACL on refs/heads/* is exclusive to Contributors+Administrators; RebarBotNava can submit and is NOT an admin; devuser (plain Registered User) and the Service-User bots cannot submit but can still push refs/for/*.

FOLLOW-UP for a human: the non-admin account 'devuser' (id 1000001) is now unable to submit. If it is a real contributor, add it to Contributors (rebar admins: gerrit set-members Contributors --add devuser, or via CONTRIBUTOR_MEMBERS in setup-project.sh); if it is a leftover test account, leave as-is.

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: Landed on main via Gerrit change 337 (Change-Id Ie7190cde), merged in 8e35bc70b; replicated to GitHub origin/main. Both gate votes passed. The live Submit-gate deployment (refs/meta/config + Contributors group + RebarBotNava) was already applied earlier. Ready to close via the completion-verifier.

compiled_state.description:
Restrict Gerrit Submit (landing) to authorized contributors, and add RebarBotNava.

## Why
Previously the project.config only restricted label *voting* to bots+admins; the Submit permission was inherited from All-Projects, so any Registered User holding the inherited grant could land a change once the bots voted MAX. We want only authorized contributors (or admins) to land; non-contributors may still propose (push refs/for/*) but must not be able to submit regardless of gate status.

## What
- Add an exclusive Submit ACL on refs/heads/* in infra/gerrit/project.config granting submit to Contributors + Administrators only (exclusiveGroupPermissions = submit), mirroring the pushMerge exclusive-override technique.
- Create the Contributors group (owner Administrators) and add RebarBotNava (member) + Administrators (subgroup); wire CONTRIBUTOR_MEMBERS convergence into setup-project.sh and add Contributors to the groups-file validation set.
- Applied live: pushed refs/meta/config (4d5a28a..98e7cb3) and created/populated the group via REST as an admin.
- Document the contributor-authorization requirement in CONTRIBUTING.md.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Submit ACL on refs/heads/* is exclusive to Contributors + Administrators (verified live)
- [ ] RebarBotNava is in Contributors and NOT in Administrators
- [ ] A plain Registered User / Service User cannot submit; can still push refs/for/*
- [ ] project.config + setup-project.sh + CONTRIBUTING.md updated to match

file_impact.reason: exclusive Submit ACL restricting landing to Contributors + Administrators

compiled_state.title: Gate Gerrit Submit to Contributors + add RebarBotNava
